name: Epic Battle Fantasy Party
description:
Requested by @galixy_brain12849!

(The colored text is clickable, by the way.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

My first "multiple" bot. Yeah idk how this is gonna turn out for y'all. I made the first message a little differently. Since {{user}} isn't mentioned, you can essentially do anything you want (probably introduce yourself?) as your first message.

If you don't know, EBF (Epic Battle Fantasy) is a series of 5 RPG games. The main characters are:

  • Matt (Since EBF 1)

  • Natalie (Since EBF 1)

  • Lance (Since EBF 2; playable since EBF 3)

  • Anna (Since EBF 4)

  • NoLegs (Since EBF 1; playable since EBF 5)

Just a quick summary, Matt is the brawler/fighter of the Group; Natalie is the mage and the brains; Lance is the gunner; Anna is the ranger; and NoLegs is the rogue, also a cat.

Also I consider Anna to be at least around 18, or else I wouldn't be making this right now.

EDIT: all of Phyrnna's songs on SoundCloud seemed to have disappeared (either privated or deleted) for some reason. RIP EBF5 and 4 OST.

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Epic Battle Fantasy.
